visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a young woman with long black hair, wearing a white leaf-patterned top. She is positioned against a gray upholstered headboard. A pink bunny ear cartoon filter with a bow is overlaid on her head. Her facial expression is calm and neutral as she begins to speak. (2) As she continues speaking, she smiles and looks directly into the camera lens. Her eyes are bright and expressive. Small white dashed marks appear under the bunny ear filter on her cheeks. A translucent volume slider UI element is briefly visible in the lower center of the frame. (3) The woman maintains her eye contact with the camera, tilting her head slightly to the left and right while talking. Her mouth movements are synchronized with the speech. The background lighting is soft and consistent, highlighting her features clearly against the neutral background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 來台灣有被搭訕嗎. (2) [Variety]: 去台灣. (3) [Variety]: 被搭訕. (4) [Variety]: 有一個. (5) [Variety]: 歪果仁. (6) [Variety]: 以為我是. (7) [Variety]: 台灣女生. (8) [Variety]: 然後. (9) [Variety]: 我是馬來西亞人. (10) [Variety]: 他有點. (11) [Variety]: 驚訝. (12) [Variety]: 之後我們. (13) [Variety]: 交換IG. (14) [Variety]: 我美食的帳號. (15) [Variety]: 嘿嘿. (16) [Variety]: 我對你們多好. (17) [Variety]: 我的IG. (18) [Variety]: 他沒有欸. (19) [Variety]: 哈哈.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white top with green leaf patterns and a pink cartoon bunny filter.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A light-colored, padded upholstered headboard or wall panel in an indoor setting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A clear female voice with a friendly and casual tone begins speaking in Mandarin. The speech rate is moderate and natural, with clear articulation and stable pitch. A soft, steady electronic background track with a lo-fi pop beat and synthesizer pads plays continuously at a lower volume. (2) A subtle "pop" sound effect, likely an intentional post-production addition, occurs as the first few text overlays appear on the screen. The voice remains consistent in its intensity and friendliness, with no significant ambient noise interference, suggesting a controlled indoor recording environment. (3) The speaker's voice rises slightly in pitch and becomes more playful towards the end of the narrative. She lets out a short, light laugh that is captured clearly. The background music maintains its tempo and volume until the clip abruptly ends without a fade-out.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a casual personal talk where the creator shares a story about being approached by a foreigner in Taiwan who thought she was Taiwanese. She clarifies she is Malaysian and jokingly reveals that she shared her food-focused Instagram account with him instead of her personal one.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Simple portrait vlog with AR filters and stylized text overlays typical of short-form social media interactions.
